title: Sweet Hentai
description:
Sweet Hentai - A simple and beautiful jigsaw puzzle game featuring five pretty and cute girls with unusual personalities. Experience their daily lives on the streets at night with lighthearted music. After completing a level, you can view the girls' photos in the gallery.

- The game has three difficulty levels: 2x2, 2x4, and 4x4.

- Press "F" during the puzzle to reveal a black and white image.

- Press the 'Space' key during gameplay to complete the puzzle.

- Players can use the A and D keys, left and right arrow keys, or left and right mouse buttons to quickly view the girls' images in the gallery.

* Puzzle image size: 800x960 px

* Gallery image size: 1088x960 px
